Skip to content
VitePress

Appearance

On this page

log ​

Prints a message, the current record count, and sample records to stdout. The payload passes through unchanged.

Supported formats: json jsonl csv

Options ​

OptionTypeRequiredDescription
messagestringNoText to print before the count and samples
countbooleanNoWhether to print the record count. Defaults to true.
sampleintegerNoNumber of sample records to print. Defaults to 10. Set to 0 to disable.

Example ​

yaml
- log:
    message: After normalization
    count: true
    sample: 5

Notes ​

  • sample: 0 (or a negative value) disables sample output.
  • Useful as a debugging checkpoint between steps.
  • The payload is not modified — log is a read-only inspection step.
